---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for UrbanPulse AI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: []
---

## 🧭 Problem / Motivation

<!-- Describe the problem you are facing or the need that motivates this feature request.
     A clear and concise description helps maintainers understand the context.
     Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]" or "The current workflow requires [...]" -->

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible about what the feature
     should do, how it should behave, and what it should look like (if applicable). -->

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
     Explain why those alternatives do not fully address the problem. -->

- **Alternative 1:** ...
- **Alternative 2:** ...
- **Why these don't work:** ...

---

## 📎 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, references, or links about the feature
     request here. If this is related to an existing issue, please link it. -->

- **Related issues / PRs:** #
- **References / prior art:** 
- **Screenshots / mockups:** *(drag and drop images here if applicable)*

---

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Define what "done" looks like for this feature. These will become the basis for
     testing and review. Replace the examples below with concrete, testable criteria. -->

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] All new code passes `npm run lint` with zero errors
- [ ] All new code passes `npm run build` with zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] Unit / integration tests cover the new functionality
- [ ] Documentation is updated to reflect the new feature
